# Sub-Level 41.3

### **Description**

Students build fluency in multiplication tables through basic multiplication facts and pattern completion. This level focuses on strengthening table recall before applying multiplication to larger calculations.

### **Sections**

### **Section A: Multiplication Facts**

Examples

* 2 × 5 \= \_\_\_  
* 3 × 4 \= \_\_\_  
* 2 × 8 \= \_\_\_

### **Section B: Complete the Table**

| ×3 | Answer |
| ----- | ----- |
| 1 × 3 | 3 |
| 2 × 3 | \_\_\_ |
| 3 × 3 | 9 |
| 4 × 3 | \_\_\_ |
| 5 × 3 | \_\_\_ |

### **Section C: Multiplication Pattern**

Examples

* 2, 4, 6, \_\_, \_\_  
* 5, 10, 15, \_\_, \_\_  
* 7, 14, 21, \_\_, \_\_
